scripts.check:xbot-dashboard: node bin/check-xbot-dashboard-vocabulary.mjs && node bin/check-xbot-dashboard-rail-contrast.mjs && node bin/check-xbot-dashboard-visual-contract.mjs && node bin/check-xbot-dashboard-learning-contract.mjs && node bin/check-xbot-dashboard-commander-contract.mjs && node bin/check-xbot-dashboard-signal-topology.mjs && node bin/check-xbot-dashboard-data-consistency.mjs
scripts.verify:xbot-dashboard: npm run check:xbot-dashboard && node --check xbot-dashboard/script.js && node --check docs/xbot-dashboard/script.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run prepare:pages && npm run verify:xbot-dashboard
